name: check_zip
description: What action to take if the zip file looks as it is not a valid asset pack. This primarily happens when someone has downloaded a zip with Safari, gotten it unpacked, repacked it with a different directory structure and then tries to install the repackaged version
label: On bad zip
items: Refuse to install a zip file which looks as if it is broken
Install the zip as is anyway
Make a spirited attempt at fixing the zip. There is no guarrantee this will work except in the simplest cases
